repo_prior_art.cite: eid_lp_svar_nonequiv/v1: inclusion and equality boundary for LP/sign versus independent non-Gaussian SVAR/sign sets

published_prior_art.cite: PlagborgMollerWolf2021: LP and VAR impulse responses agree under common identifying restrictions, including sign restrictions

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_lp_svar_nonequiv/v1: primitive strict gap under exact independent-shock cumulant diagonalization

published_prior_art.cite: none; LanneLiuLuoto2026 covers dependent non-Gaussian SVAR identification under absence of relevant co-skewness/co-kurtosis, not an LP/SVAR support equality leakage frontier

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_lp_svar_nonequiv/v1: two-shock independent-cumulant witness, with reflection and boundary cases left unresolved

published_prior_art.cite: none; Guay2021 gives higher-moment rank conditions and AriasRubioRamirezWaggoner2018 gives sign/zero rotation algorithms, not a closed-form leakage-radius formula

novelty_flags.label: upgrade_review
novelty_flags.one_line: The generalization axis is only partial: the eta-bounded leakage class is introduced, but the flagship equality frontier eta_w^*(P)=eta_w^dagger(P) follows directly from the definitions of Q_eta, eta_w^*, and eta_w^dagger rather than from a new primitive theorem; tier=field below novelty_target=flagship.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: Section 4 and the §8 why-new block say the frontier is not definitional, but §6 defines eta_w^dagger as the same exposed-face residual infimum that defines eta_w^*, while Assumption primitive-rank already assumes uniqueness, pure-diagonal contact, and positive finite residual.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Move positivity, uniqueness, and residual separation out of Assumption primitive-rank and into Conjecture 1 as consequences of lower-level observable rank/transversality inequalities.

State an explicit strict-containment comparison to Lanne-Liu-Luoto: identify the zero co-kurtosis corner, the eta-bounded class that strictly contains it, and the observable boundary separating the two.
For Conjecture 2, write the actual two-shock trigonometric quartic residual formula and a named nondegenerate open set where the interval 0 <= eta < eta_w^dagger is nonempty.

recommended_next_step: Revise Conjecture 1 so the flagship delta is a nondefinitional open-class theorem, not the equality of two first-contact definitions.

upgrade_review.upgrade_delta_one_line: Eta-bounded leakage widens the parent premise class, but the current frontier theorem is mostly definitional and therefore does not yet deliver a flagship-grade generalization.
